description: Public-source RAG seed index for the imported Factory artist guidance.
boundary: Docs-only source pointers. No transcripts, no vendored articles, no runtime wiring, no audit procedure.

reusePolicy.discourse: Reference and summarize with attribution; do not copy full posts, captions, transcripts, podcasts, books, or course content.
reusePolicy.code: Reuse only repositories with a visible compatible license. Treat no-license public repositories as inspect-only.
reusePolicy.ingestion: A future ingestion job must fetch sources fresh, respect site terms, and store citations/metadata with any derived notes.

people.primaryUse: Offer design, funnel pressure-testing, growth clarity, and blunt commercial prioritization.
AI engineering taste, minimal didactic code, model intuition, and clear technical explanations.
Pop-art framing, fame loops, taste, repetition, surface, and cultural distribution.
Observability, production ownership, sociotechnical systems, deploy discipline, and debugging culture.
Agent demos, practical automation patterns, prompt/product iteration, and build-along AI workflows.
Flow economics, queueing, WIP control, cost of delay, batch size, and product development tradeoffs.
Long-form interview synthesis, AI forecasting, intellectual taste, and high-context research extraction.
AI agents, developer education, practical open-source demos, and community-readable explanations.
TypeScript rigor, explanation-first pedagogy, exercise design, and type-system taste.
Product lens, AI strategy, executive communication, launch filtering, and market sensemaking.
Mac/iOS engineering, shipping taste, agent tooling, automation ergonomics, and pragmatic app craft.
Systems thinking, engineering culture, agent orchestration, codebase scale, and contrarian synthesis.
Full-stack product engineering, React/TypeScript stack judgment, developer tooling, and startup pragmatism.
AI research judgment, self-supervised learning, world models, and long-horizon architecture critique.
